🎶 Kerr We Go DRC! 🎶
Tap play to sing along on your way to the Research Triangle
🎶 Kerr we go DRC! Kerr we go DRC! Research Triangle, we dey come! 🎶 Chairman Amina Kawa... don blow di whistle! Betty Fonah... Women dem don ready! Junior Kenzo... YG don warm di dance floor! Rakie Rashid-Sandi... mic don hot already! 🎤😂 Arizona, Ohio... clear road! Dallas, Houston... start engine! New York, New Jersey... bus don full! Minnesota, New England... book seat! Virginia, Georgia... roll out! Cali North, Cali South... fly in! DC, Seattle... link up! Canada Region... passport ready! Iowa, Florida... nor miss di flight! Sep 24... Meet & Greet! Shake hand, laugh small! Sep 25... Inauguration! Dress sharp, camera ready! Sep 26... Cookout Picnic! Rice, jollof, BBQ... nor ask who cook am... just eat! 😂 SLPPNA-DRC Executive Inauguration 📍 Research Triangle, North Carolina One Country! One People! SLPP Forward Ever! 💚🤍💙 Who nor cam... go hear "e sweet!" 😂 Who cam... go make history! 🎉 🎶 Kerr we go DRC... Everybody... leh we go!! 🎶
ONE COUNTRY, ONE PEOPLE!
SLPPNA-DRC Chapter · Research Triangle, North Carolina
